title: QUE HAY PUEBLA
subtitle: Scalable B2B SaaS platform for business discovery with end-to-end automation from onboarding to subscriptions.
about:
What is QUE HAY PUEBLA?

Small businesses need an accessible physical footprint online. This geographic SaaS allows local stores without websites to exist on a highly optimized mapping engine, processing discovery and regional clustering while handling subscription monetization.

challenge.title: The Challenge: Fragmented discovery and manual onboarding
challenge.description: Before this platform, small businesses relied on fragmented social media posting or expensive bespoke websites. Scaling a local directory was blocked by manual approval hurdles.

cards.title: Efficiency Killer
cards.description: Data collection for business locations and hours was managed over manual emails and spreadsheets.

cards.title: Lack of Transparency
cards.description: End users had no real-time overview of active businesses in their specific neighborhood zones.

cards.title: High Error Risk
cards.description: Manual verification of business statuses and subscription payments created bottlenecks.

solution.title: Our Solution: A highly automated geographic infrastructure
solution.description: We evolved the concept from a simple directory into a market-ready platform that centralizes and automates the entire process — from data capture to recurring billing.

features.title: Interactive Mapping System
features.description: Users can seamlessly filter through 8 distinct city zones with live-rendered map coordinates.

features.title: Multi-tenant Architecture
features.description: We built a robust RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) system securing business owner dashboards.

features.title: Automated Background Engine
features.description: Automated webhook listening for Stripe ensures instant activation or revocation of premium listings.

features.title: Self-Service Portal
features.description: Business clients get completely transparent access to upload their own imagery and track metrics.

techStack.title: Our Tech-Stack: Performance & Security
techStack.description: To manage sensitive user data and provide high-speed map tile rendering, we rely on a modern Fullstack setup:

categories.name: Frontend
categories.description: Next.js (React) for bleeding-edge rendering speeds, combined with Tailwind CSS for an atomic styling approach.

categories.name: Data Model
categories.description: PostgreSQL structured via Prisma ORM allowing complex relational queries across thousands of location nodes.

results.title: 100+ active businesses
results.description: are already relying on the platform for their digital presence.

results.title: Thousands of map queries
results.description: processed flawlessly during peak weekend discovery hours.

results.title: Complete Automation
results.description: Zero administrative overhead required for new business onboarding and subscription tier changes.
